comments:
Stylize Effects — Effect types for visual styling.

Includes enums for various stylize effects plus complete property
records for Drop Shadow, Bevel/Emboss, Glow effects.

declarations.comments: Blend mode for RGB split effect.
declarations.title: RGBSplitBlendMode

declarations.comments: All RGB split blend modes for enumeration
declarations.title: allRGBSplitBlendModes

declarations.comments: All pixel sort directions for enumeration
declarations.title: allPixelSortDirections

declarations.comments: All sort by criteria for enumeration
declarations.title: allSortByCriteria

declarations.comments: All halftone color modes for enumeration
declarations.title: allHalftoneColorModes

declarations.comments: All dither matrix sizes for enumeration
declarations.title: allDitherMatrixSizes

declarations.comments: All effect color channels for enumeration
declarations.title: allEffectColorChannels

declarations.comments:
Drop Shadow effect — adds shadow behind layer.

Properties match standard Drop Shadow:
- direction: Angle of shadow (0° = right, 90° = down)
- distance: How far shadow extends in pixels
- softness: Blur amount of shadow
- opacity: Shadow transparency
- color: Shadow color (RGB 0-1)
declarations.title: DropShadowEffect

declarations.comments: Bevel and Emboss effect — adds 3D depth to edges.
declarations.title: BevelEmbossEffect

declarations.comments: Bevel style for Bevel and Emboss effect.
declarations.title: BevelStyle

declarations.comments: Stroke effect — adds outline around layer.
declarations.title: StrokeEffect

name: Hydrogen.Schema.Motion.Effects.Stylize
